title: Country column - global option
excerpt: We use the country column to track projects per country (we like the use of flags as its visually nice which is why we don’t just have a text or dropdown column) but there are some projects that span global, there is cur…

posts.author: JonGottler (Jonathan Gottler)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use the country column to track projects per country (we like the use of flags as its visually nice which is why we don’t just have a text or dropdown column) but there are some projects that span global, there is currently no option for this.

Could this be added, so the option would be “Global” with a picture of the earth where the flag usually goes.
